channel.title: Tech Blog on Usually Unusual
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Blog on Usually Unusual

item.title: 1b - How a single node actually works - LSM tree based DB's.
item.description: How an LSM tree based single node DB works including compaction, MemTables, SSTables,tombstoning, read and write amplification

item.title: 1a - How a single node actually works?
item.description: How a single node DB works like from page structure, on-disk storage, indexing, WAL.

item.title: What needle are you trying to move?
item.description: The gap between good engineers and great ones isn’t technical skill. It’s knowing which needle to move and when.
